gantt
    title Sprint with weekends excluded
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    excludes weekends
    section Build
        Completed task :done, des1, 2024-01-08, 2024-01-10
        Active task    :active, des2, 2024-01-11, 3d
        Future task    :des3, after des2, 5d
    section Review
        Crit review    :crit, rev1, after des3, 2d
---
               Sprint with weekends excluded

  Build
    Completed task  .....-----------------------------------  01-08 -> 01-10
    Active task     -------============---------------------  01-11 -> 01-16
    Future task     -------------------################-----  01-16 -> 01-23
  Review
    Crit review     -----------------------------------!!!!!  01-23 -> 01-25
                    ----------------------------------------
                                  01-14            01-21
